debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

failed_attempts:
by
    -- help the instance inference a bit
    haveI (n : ℕ) : Finite (S.component n) :=
      inferInstanceAs (Finite (FintypeCat.toLightProfinite.obj _))
    haveI : Nonempty (S.component 0) := Nonempty.map (S.proj 0) inferInstance
    haveI (n : ℕ) : Epi (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) :=
      (Profinite.epi_iff_surjective _).mpr (S.surjective_transitionMap n)
    -- base step of the induction: find k0
    haveI (n : ℕ) : Finite (lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n)) := by
      change Finite (S.component n : Type _); infer_instance
    haveI : Nonempty (lightToProfinite.obj (S.component 0)) := by
      change Nonempty (S.component 0 : Type _); infer_instance
    obtain ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ := Injective.factors (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj 0)) f
    -- key part of induction step
    have h_step (n : ℕ) (k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n))
        (h_down : f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)) :
        ∃ k' : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component (n+1)),
          k' ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) = k ∧
          f ≫ k' = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1)) := by
      have h_comm : f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1)) ≫
          lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) := by
        rw [h_down, ← Functor.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap]
      exact profinite_key_extension_lemma _ _ _ _ f
        (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n))
        (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1))) k h_comm
    let lifts (n : ℕ) := { k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n) //
        f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n) }
    let next (n : ℕ) : lifts n → lifts (n+1) :=
      fun k ↦ ⟨Classical.choose (h_step n k.val k.property),
        (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n k.val k.property)).2⟩
    let k_seq (n : Nat) : lifts n := Nat.rec ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ next n
    have h_down (n : ℕ) : f ≫ (k_seq n).val = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n) :=
      (k_seq n).property
    have h_up (n : ℕ) : (k_seq (n+1)).val ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) =
        (k_seq n).val := by
      induction n with
      | zero => exact (Classical.choose_spec (h_step 0 k0 h_down0)).1
      | succ n ih =>
        exact (Classical.choose_spec (h_step (n+1) (k_seq (n+1)).val (k_seq (n+1)).property)).1
    -- build a cone for (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite) with point Y
    let pro_limit := isLimitOfPreserves lightToProfinite S.asLimit
    have nat_k : ∀ n, ((Functor.const ℕᵒᵖ).obj Y).map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op ≫
        (k_seq n).val = (k_seq (n + 1)).val ≫
        (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite).map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op := by
      intro n
      show 𝟙 Y ≫ (k_seq n).val = (k_seq (n + 1)).val ≫
        lightToProfinite.map (S.diagram.map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op)
      simp only [Category.id_comp]
      exact (h_up n).symm
    let k_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite) :=
      { pt := Y, π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k_seq n).val) nat_k }
    use pro_limit.lift k_cone
    have k_cone_app (n : ℕᵒᵖ) : k_cone.π.app n = (k_seq n.unop).val := by
      simp only [k_cone, NatTrans.ofOpSequence_app]; try rfl
    -- build the g cone
    have nat_g : ∀ n, ((Functor.const ℕᵒᵖ).obj X).map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op ≫
        (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)) = (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n + 1))) ≫
        (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite).map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op := by
      intro n
      show 𝟙 X ≫ (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)) =
        (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n + 1))) ≫
        lightToProfinite.map (S.diagram.map (homOfLE (Nat.le_succ n)).op)
      simp only [Category.id_comp, Category.assoc]
      erw [← Functor.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap]
    let g_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite) :=
      { pt := X, π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence
          (fun n ↦ g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)) nat_g }
    have g_cone_app (n : ℕᵒᵖ) :
        g_cone.π.app n = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n.unop) := by
      simp only [g_cone, NatTrans.ofOpSequence_app]; try rfl
    -- show g = pro_limit.lift g_cone
    have pro_cone_app (n : ℕᵒᵖ) :
        (lightToProfinite.mapCone S.asLimitCone).π.app n =
        lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n.unop) := by
      rfl
    have hg : g = pro_limit.lift g_cone := by
      apply pro_limit.uniq g_cone
      intro n
      rw [g_cone_app, pro_cone_app]; try rfl
    rw [hg]
    apply pro_limit.uniq g_cone
    intro n
    rw [g_cone_app]
    erw [Category.assoc, pro_limit.fac k_cone, k_cone_app, h_down]
